description: Reusable shot motifs for high-pressure flow-state shorts. Replace racing-specific objects with project-specific equivalents when user ideas require it.
motif_rules: Use motifs as reusable shot grammar, not as mandatory literal racing shots.
When user-provided creative direction conflicts with a motif, keep the user's idea and translate the motif's function.
Each rapid-cut cluster should mix at least three tactile motifs rather than repeating the same object.
Do not copy reference subjects, brands, captions, watermarks, or exact compositions.

motifs.name: 遮挡下的眼神极近特写
motifs.function: 把人物困在局部视野里，制造幽闭和专注。
motifs.visual_prompt_seed: extreme close-up of one eye partly hidden by visor, glass, shadow, rain, or medical mask; near-monochrome high contrast, wet silver highlights
motifs.video_prompt_seed: micro movement in the eye, tiny reflection flicker, shallow breathing, camera nearly locked but tense
motifs.sfx: breath inside enclosed space, faint fabric creak, distant low rumble

motifs.name: 手部压力
motifs.function: 把心理压力转成触觉动作。
motifs.visual_prompt_seed: gloved hand gripping wheel, instrument, scalpel, keyboard, rope, or piano key; compressed macro framing; tactile texture
motifs.video_prompt_seed: fingers tighten almost imperceptibly, object trembles slightly, small vibration in frame
motifs.sfx: leather strain, knuckle movement, object friction

motifs.name: 临界仪表
motifs.function: 用系统信号提示失控边缘。
motifs.visual_prompt_seed: red signal light, gauge needle, warning LED, timer, monitor waveform, or countdown crossing threshold; mostly black and white with rare red accent
motifs.video_prompt_seed: red light pulses, needle or value creeps toward limit, hard cut on signal peak
motifs.sfx: electronic beep, mechanical tick, low sub pulse

motifs.name: 湿润机械细节
motifs.function: 提供工业现实感和冷峻材质。
motifs.visual_prompt_seed: wet carbon fiber, metal seam, tire surface, surgical steel, piano wire, server rack, rain droplets; silver specular highlights
motifs.video_prompt_seed: droplets tremble, highlight slides across surface, tiny vibration or airflow
motifs.sfx: rain taps, metal vibration, low engine or machine bed

motifs.name: 后视镜残影
motifs.function: 表现恐惧、过去和杂念被抛在身后。
motifs.visual_prompt_seed: blurred reflection in mirror, polished metal, glass, visor, monitor black screen; ghosted movement behind subject
motifs.video_prompt_seed: reflection jitters or streaks backward while foreground stays tense
motifs.sfx: whoosh tail, muffled impact, distant crowd or system noise

motifs.name: 黑场小人物
motifs.function: 用巨大负空间压小人物，建立孤独和宿命感。
motifs.visual_prompt_seed: tiny human figure or object inside vast black negative space, rain haze, industrial geometry, single red signal point
motifs.video_prompt_seed: slow push or locked-off hold, subject barely moves, space feels heavy
motifs.sfx: room tone, low wind, far machinery

motifs.name: 快切触觉组
motifs.function: 在 0.6-1.2 秒镜头里堆叠身体压力。
motifs.visual_prompt_seed: three to five tactile inserts: eye, hand, signal, surface, breath, rain; high contrast near-monochrome
motifs.video_prompt_seed: rapid hard-cut cluster, each shot has one decisive micro action, no explanatory text
motifs.sfx: syncopated breaths, ticks, impact hits, short air pressure bursts

motifs.name: 暴风眼静止
motifs.function: 在极动之后突然抽空声音和运动。
motifs.visual_prompt_seed: still subject in a quiet center, surrounding chaos softened or blurred; pale silver light, deep blacks
motifs.video_prompt_seed: all motion slows, camera stabilizes, subject appears suspended inside silence
motifs.sfx: near-silence, isolated breath, distant muted tone

motifs.name: 现实空间超现实化
motifs.function: 把职业场景升华成心流意象。
motifs.visual_prompt_seed: real environment subtly transforms into impossible scale: track into cloud road, operating room into white void, office into orbital grid
motifs.video_prompt_seed: slow drift forward, realistic textures remain but space opens beyond normal physics
motifs.sfx: soft air bloom, filtered machine tone, slow tonal swell for post mix

motifs.name: 终局悬浮远景
motifs.function: 让人物和系统合一，完成心理释放。
motifs.visual_prompt_seed: wide negative-space final image, subject small but centered in a vast abstract path, ring, corridor, cloud layer, or horizon
motifs.video_prompt_seed: calm glide or locked-off hold, no subtitles, no logo, no explanatory text
motifs.sfx: subtle wind, fading machine resonance, calm breath
